message:
fix(tui): CancelGuard for extension hostcalls + input resize viewport sync

(These changes were made by concurrent agents but were unstaged when
the previous commit cycle grabbed only some files.)

- extension_dispatcher.rs: CancelGuard RAII struct ensures the cancel
  flag is set on task drop
- interactive.rs: refresh_conversation_viewport when input height
  changes during idle key handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
